hero_subtitle: We are committed to protecting your privacy and handling your data with transparency, security, and respect.
intro: Xontel ("we", "our", or "us") operates the Xontel Omnichannel mobile application and web platform (the "Service"). This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information when you use our Service. By using the Service, you agree to the practices described below.
s1_account_text: Name, email address, and credentials you provide during registration.
s1_comms_text: Messages, calls, and emails processed through the platform on behalf of your organization.
s1_device_text: Device type, operating system version, and unique device identifiers.
s1_usage_text: Log data, interaction timestamps, and feature usage patterns to improve the Service.
s2_body: Our application requests the CAMERA permission solely to let you capture photos or record video to share within your conversations. We never access, store, or transmit camera data without your explicit action. You may deny this permission at any time through your device settings — all core messaging and call features will continue to work without it.
s3_item1: Provide, operate, and maintain the Service.
s3_item2: Authenticate users and manage account security.
s3_item3: Enable messaging, calls, and email features.
s4_note: We do not sell your personal information — ever.
s4_providers_text: Third-party vendors who assist in operating the Service under strict confidentiality agreements.
s4_org_text: Administrators within your organization who manage the platform.
s4_legal_text: When required by law or to protect our rights.
s5_body: We implement industry-standard security measures including encryption in transit (TLS) and at rest. While no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure, we continuously monitor and improve our security practices to protect your data.
s6_body: We retain your information for as long as your account is active or as needed to provide the Service. You may request deletion of your personal data by contacting us at the address below.
s7_body: Depending on your location you may have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal data, object to processing, and request data portability. To exercise these rights, please contact us.
s8_body: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of significant changes by posting the new policy on this page and updating the effective date. Continued use of the Service after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
contact_subtitle: Questions about this policy? We're here to help.
